hero.subtitle: Powerful payment APIs built for developers. Go live in days, not months.

payment.title1: Easy and affordable for your personal and

0.title: Create an account
0.details: Sign up in minutes with securely encrypted credentials. Your dashboard is ready instantly to start managing transactions.

1.title: Verify your identity
1.details: Quick and seamless KYC process to ensure your account meets compliance standards without delaying your launch.

2.title: Link your bank account
2.details: Connect your preferred payout methods instantly through our secure banking integrations to receive your funds.

benefit.subtitle: Grow revenues and delight your customers by building financial features.

items.0: Drop-in REST and TypeScript SDKs handle every payment flow you need — checkout, subscriptions, payouts, refunds.
items.1: Real-time webhook delivery with automatic retries, idempotency keys, and replay from the dashboard.
items.2: PCI-DSS Level 1 compliant out of the box. We handle card data so you stay out of scope.
items.3: Smart routing across acquirers boosts authorization rates and falls back automatically on failure.
items.4: Live test mode with realistic latency and error injection so you ship integrations with confidence.

spend.subtitle: Gain full visibility into your company's expenses. Track real-time transactions, set intelligent budgets, and eliminate unnecessary spending effortlessly.

method.subtitle: Embed powerful financial features into your product. Build in minutes, launch in weeks.

0.title: Physical & Virtual Cards
0.details: Fully programmable, debit and credit physical & virtual cards for individuals and businesses. Let your users access their money instantly.

1.title: Banking
1.details: Offer full checking and savings accounts alongside your product seamlessly.

2.title: Payments
2.details: Accept global payments with our unified API and intelligent routing engine.

3.title: Access $175,000 in partner rewards
3.details: Unlock exclusive offers and credits from our built-in partners like AWS, Stripe, and Hubspot.

pricing.subtitle: No hidden fees. No surprises. Pick the plan that fits your volume and scale as you grow.

search.noFees: No setup fees, no monthly minimums. Pay only for what you use.
search.review: Payflow cut our integration time from weeks to days. The API is clean, the docs are excellent, and the support team actually responds. It's the payment layer we always wanted.

mobile.subtitle: Cards issued through us can easily be added to mobile wallets to be used to buy online, in-store, and in-app instantly.

perks.0: When you pay with a debit or credit card, Mobile App doesn't keep transaction information that can be tied back to you.
perks.1: Digital wallets are becoming more popular than ever before.
perks.2: You can also add your student ID card to Wallet to access places like your dorm and the library.

solution.subtitle: Custom contracts, dedicated support, and SLA guarantees for teams processing high volumes.

faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before getting started.

0.a: You only pay when you transact. The Starter plan is free forever with no setup fees. Growth and Scale plans unlock higher limits, premium support, and lower international fees.

1.a: Yes. We're PCI-DSS Level 1 certified, SOC 2 Type II compliant, and use AES-256 encryption at rest with TLS 1.3 in transit. Your data never leaves audited regions.

2.q: Which integrations are supported out of the box?
2.a: Stripe, Plaid, Wise, Apple Pay, Google Pay, and 40+ banks via our unified API. Custom integrations are available on the Scale plan.

3.q: Can I cancel or downgrade at any time?
3.a: Yes. Cancel from your dashboard in one click, no questions asked. Pro-rated refunds are issued automatically for unused annual time.

4.q: What kind of support do I get?
4.a: Starter gets community + email support. Growth gets priority email with a 24-hour SLA. Scale gets a dedicated Slack channel and a named account engineer.

5.q: Do you offer a free trial?
5.a: Yes. Growth and Scale come with a 14-day free trial — no credit card required. Starter is free forever for projects under 1,000 transactions/month.
